primary_text:
50+ regenerative farms across NSW. 2,000+ customers. A Brookvale hub operating Monday to Friday.

FarmThru is a new kind of grocery store, connecting regenerative farms directly to families through a hub-and-collect model. No unnecessary middlemen. Honest prices.

In July 2026, we're opening our equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal. From $50.

Join the waitlist now to be first in when the campaign opens.

Not financial advice.
headline: 50+ farms. 2,000+ customers. Your turn
description: FarmThru is opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026. From $50.
creative_brief: Clean infographic style. Three stat blocks: 50+ farms, 2,000+ customers, Brookvale hub. Warm green palette. Birchal logo small in corner.
